description:
You are playing the role of a FinOps analyst who has just received several daily raw-cost CSV extracts produced by an internal cloud-metering tool.  
    Your job is to tidy up the working area, calculate a monthly cost summary, and leave a clear audit trail for later compliance checks.

    1.  Raw input files  
        • They are already present under /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/  
        • Each file name follows the pattern “sep<DAY>.csv”, for example “sep1.csv”, “sep2.csv”, …  
        • Every CSV file is UTF-8 text and has this exact three-column header on its first line (case-sensitive):  
          service,region,amount  
        • Lines after the header contain:
              – service  →  an AWS service name (e.g. EC2, S3, RDS, …)  
              – region   →  the AWS region (e.g. us-east-1)  
              – amount   →  a decimal number representing that day’s spend in USD

    2.  What you must create
        A) The directory /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/  
           • Make sure it exists (create it if necessary).  
        B) A plain-text summary file called /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/summary_sep_2023.log  
           • File format (strict, line-by-line):
                 Line 1 :  GENERATED_AT: 2023-09-30T00:00:00Z
                 Line 2 :  (must be completely blank)
                 Line 3+ : one line per distinct service, sorted by total spend (highest first).  
                           Each service line must be exactly: SERVICE|TOTAL_USD  
                           – SERVICE      → uppercase version of the service name in the CSV files  
                           – TOTAL_USD    → the aggregated September spend for that service, shown with two decimal places  
                 After all service lines, add one completely blank line.  
                 Final line : OVERALL_TOTAL|<overall_spend_with_two_decimals>
        C) A plain-text action log /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/actions.log  
           • File format (strict, line-by-line, no spaces):  
                 MOVED:<absolute_source_path>-><absolute_destination_path>      (one line per file you move)  
                 SUMMARY_GENERATED:/home/user/cloud_costs/reports/summary_sep_2023.log
           • The “MOVED:” lines must appear in the same order that you move/rename the raw files.
        D) Move (do not copy) every processed CSV file from /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/ to /home/user/cloud_costs/archive/  
           • Create /home/user/cloud_costs/archive/ if it does not exist.  
           • Append “.done” to the original filename (e.g. sep1.csv ➜ sep1.csv.done).  
           • The moved files must keep their original contents.

    3.  Technical and validation notes  
        • Do not hard-code any spend figures; compute them by parsing every “sep*.csv” file present in /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/.  
        • The GENERATED_AT timestamp must be exactly the literal string shown above.  
        • Use the pipe character “|” with no extra spaces as separator in the summary file.  
        • The automated grader will check:
              – that the summary and action log files exist at the precise paths given,  
              – that their contents exactly match the required format (including blank lines and order),  
              – that all original CSV files were moved and correctly renamed into /home/user/cloud_costs/archive/,  
              – that the totals inside summary_sep_2023.log are mathematically correct according to the data in the raw CSV files.  
        • You do not need to compress anything and you do not need root privileges.  
        • All commands must be executed from a regular user shell.  
        • Feel free to perform intermediate calculations in temporary files or variables, but only the artefacts described above will be inspected.
truth:
Initial filesystem state (before the agent starts):

    1. Directories
       /home/user/cloud_costs/
       /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/

    2. Files inside /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/
       /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep1.csv
       /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep2.csv
       /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep3.csv

    3. Contents
       /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep1.csv
           service,region,amount
           EC2,us-east-1,120.50
           S3,us-east-1,30.00
           Lambda,us-east-1,10.50

       /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep2.csv
           service,region,amount
           EC2,us-east-1,100.00
           S3,us-east-1,25.00
           RDS,us-east-1,80.00

       /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep3.csv
           service,region,amount
           EC2,us-west-2,90.00
           S3,us-west-2,20.00
           RDS,us-west-2,60.00

    Expected final filesystem state (after the agent completes the task):

    1. Newly created directories
       /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/
       /home/user/cloud_costs/archive/

    2. Moved raw files (content unchanged)
       /home/user/cloud_costs/archive/sep1.csv.done
       /home/user/cloud_costs/archive/sep2.csv.done
       /home/user/cloud_costs/archive/sep3.csv.done

    3. Summary file
       /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/summary_sep_2023.log
       Exact text content (line breaks are LF):

           GENERATED_AT: 2023-09-30T00:00:00Z

           EC2|310.50
           RDS|140.00
           S3|75.00
           Lambda|10.50

           OVERALL_TOTAL|536.00

    4. Action log
       /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/actions.log
       Exact text content (line breaks are LF):

           MOVED:/home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep1.csv->/home/user/cloud_costs/archive/sep1.csv.done
           MOVED:/home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep2.csv->/home/user/cloud_costs/archive/sep2.csv.done
           MOVED:/home/user/cloud_costs/raw/sep3.csv->/home/user/cloud_costs/archive/sep3.csv.done
           SUMMARY_GENERATED:/home/user/cloud_costs/reports/summary_sep_2023.log
